# On Truth and Lie in a Nonmoral Sense

*[Nietzsche](../philosophers/nietzsche.md) · 1873*

A short early text unpublished in Nietzsche's lifetime, it defines truth as a "mobile army of metaphors" gone forgotten, a convention useful for life rather than a correspondence to reality. It lays the groundwork of his perspectivism very early.
